sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { FiBriefcase, FiCheckSquare } from 'react-icons/fi'; const Experience = () => { const roles = [ { title: 'Senior Civil / Project Engineer', company: 'ABC Engineering Firm', location: 'Singapore', date: '2020 - Present', logo: '', summary: 'Supported civil infrastructure packages from preconstruction through site delivery, with a focus on coordination, documentation, and construction-phase follow-through.', details: [ 'Prepared and tracked RFIs, technical submissions, drawing markups, and site instructions.', 'Coordinated contractors, consultants, inspectors, and internal project teams during active works.', 'Maintained quantity reviews, progress reports, cost trackers, and change records for project leads.', ], }, { title: 'Civil Engineer', company: 'XYZ Infrastructure', location: 'Singapore', date: '2018 - 2020', logo: '', summary: 'Worked across public works scopes including roads, drainage, utilities, inspections, and contractor coordination.', details: [ 'Carried out site checks, QA/QC documentation, and closeout tracking for civil works.', 'Prepared field reports, permit notes, inspection summaries, and construction documentation.', 'Reviewed drawings and helped resolve site issues with supervisors and subcontractors.', ], }, { title: 'Graduate Civil Engineer', company: 'Regional Design Consultancy', location: 'Singapore', date: '2016 - 2018', logo: '', summary: 'Built early technical experience in design documentation, quantity takeoffs, and coordination support for civil and structural packages.', details: [ 'Assisted with AutoCAD drawings, calculation packs, schedules, and design review notes.', 'Produced takeoffs and comparison sheets for tender and procurement support.', 'Joined site walks to compare construction progress against drawings and specifications.', ], }, ]; return (
Featured Experience

Civil Works, Project Delivery, and Construction Coordination

A focused record of delivering technical work packages, coordinating field teams, and keeping infrastructure projects moving with disciplined controls.

{roles.map((role) => (
{role.date}
{role.logo ? ( ) : ( )}

{role.title}

{role.company}

{role.location}

{role.summary}

    {role.details.map((detail) => (
  • {detail}
    • ))}
))}
); }; export default Experience;
